name: place-memory-field-replay
description: Broader field-style map-assistant replay: varied cities, multilingual turns, travel/date/family/business/study workflows, ambient calibration, source grounding, and routine rollups.

sessions.title: late train vegan dinner in London

turns.content: "Night Noodle" near King's Cross is vegan, open late, quiet, uncrowded, a 6 minute walk from the station, around £18. "Queue Burger" is crowded, loud, has a long line, and closes early.
After the delayed train, pick "Night Noodle" — I loved that it was vegan, quiet, uncrowded, and 6 minutes from the station.
I tried "Queue Burger" another night and disliked it, too crowded and loud after travel.
"Canal Bistro" in Paris is 4.5km away, romantic, quiet, and about €80. "Club Rouge" is 2km away but loud and crowded.
For date night with my partner, I loved "Canal Bistro"; the quiet romantic room was worth the 4.5km.
I disliked "Club Rouge" later, too loud and crowded for a date.
"Maple Yard" is outdoor, calm, stroller friendly, low crowd, a 10 minute walk, about $30. "Tiny Counter" is cramped, noisy, and packed.
For family brunch with the baby stroller, pick "Maple Yard" — loved the outdoor calm space and low crowd.
Skip "Tiny Counter" next time; I disliked how noisy and packed it felt.
"Jing'an Study Room" in Jing'an is quiet, low-noise, near the metro, and uncrowded. "Nanjing Arcade" is packed, loud, and touristy.
下午要学习, pick "Jing'an Study Room" — loved the low-noise tables by the metro.
我后来 tried "Nanjing Arcade" and disliked it; too loud and crowded for studying.
"Cedar Table" in Madrid is quiet, professional, near the metro, and has vegetarian options. "Tapas Barrel" is lively and loud.
For a client meeting, I loved "Cedar Table" because it was quiet, vegetarian-friendly, and close to transit.
I disliked "Tapas Barrel" for business; too loud for clients.
"Park Garden Cafe" is outdoor, quiet, uncrowded, child-friendly, and a 7 minute walk from the bus. "Mall Food Court" is packed and loud.
For weekend family brunch, I loved "Park Garden Cafe" because it was outdoor, quiet, uncrowded, and close to the bus.
I disliked "Mall Food Court" with the kids, too packed and loud.

probes.query: vegan open late dinner near the station after a train
outdoor family brunch low crowd stroller
quiet professional client meeting vegetarian transit
